title: DayPhaseDef
description: Day-phase trigger layer (plan/05 §2): named phases over hour ranges. The active phase sets global flags (is_night, ...) and publishes Time.PhaseChanged; the light curve is data hosts may sample for visuals.

description.description: One line for humans and LLMs (surfaced by the manifest).

inherits.description: Parent def ID (same kind); objects deep-merge, scalars override, arrays replace or take {"$append"/"$remove"} patches.
